title: 'Struggling to imagine a world without him' - family of DJ Warras mourns his death
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The family of Warrick Stock,...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The family of Warrick Stock, popularly known as “DJ Warras”, are heartbroken and shocked by his death.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The family of Warrick Stock, popularly known as “DJ Warras”, are heartbroken and shocked by his death."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 40-year-old former 5FM presenter and Cliff Central jock was allegedly approached by three gunmen who opened fire on him while he was parking his vehicle in the Johannesburg CBD on Tuesday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gauteng police are investigating the motive behind the murder of “DJ Warras” and are studying CCTV footage.","html":"Gauteng police are investigating the motive behind the murder of “DJ Warras” and are studying CCTV footage."},{"type":"heading","text":"Distraught","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Acting family spokesperson Melanie Ramjee said the Stock family are struggling to come to terms with the DJ’s death.","html":"Acting family spokesperson Melanie Ramjee said the Stock family are struggling to come to terms with the DJ’s death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The senseless nature of his passing has left his family devastated, broken and struggling to imagine a world without him.","html":"“The senseless nature of his passing has left his family devastated, broken and struggling to imagine a world without him."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"A devoted son, a loving and proud father, a cherished brother and uncle, Warrick was the heart and anchor of his family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Warrick Stock aka DJ Warras Photo: X.com @Shady_Lurker","html":"
Warrick Stock aka DJ Warras Photo: X.com @Shady_Lurker
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Affectionately known as DJ Warras, also known as ‘The Shady Lurker’, he brought light, laughter and strength into every space he occupied. His influence and kindness extended far beyond his home, and he was deeply loved by his friends, colleagues and the wider South African entertainment community,” Ramjee said.","html":"“Affectionately known as DJ Warras, also known as ‘The Shady Lurker’, he brought light, laughter and strength into every space he occupied. His influence and kindness extended far beyond his home, and he was deeply loved by his friends, colleagues and the wider South African entertainment community,” Ramjee said."},{"type":"heading","text":"Privacy","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Warrick leaves behind his three young children, his mother and his siblings.","html":"Warrick leaves behind his three young children, his mother and his siblings."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Ramjee said the Stock family has asked for privacy, compassion and understanding during this difficult time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“They also respectfully request that the South African Police Service be given the space and support needed to thoroughly investigate this tragic crime, so that justice may be served. They kindly ask that they be kept in your thoughts and prayers as they navigate this deep and painful loss.”","html":"“They also respectfully request that the South African Police Service be given the space and support needed to thoroughly investigate this tragic crime, so that justice may be served. They kindly ask that they be kept in your thoughts and prayers as they navigate this deep and painful loss.”"},{"type":"heading","text":"Funeral","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramjee said the Stock family extended their gratitude for the outpouring of love, messages of support and condolences received since the news of Warrick’s passing was made public.","html":"Ramjee said the Stock family extended their gratitude for the outpouring of love, messages of support and condolences received since the news of Warrick’s passing was made public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Your kindness, compassion and solidarity have brought moments of comfort during an incredibly dark time.”","html":"“Your kindness, compassion and solidarity have brought moments of comfort during an incredibly dark time.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ramjee added that details regarding memorial and funeral arrangements will be shared in due course.","html":"Ramjee added that details regarding memorial and funeral arrangements will be shared in due course."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article courtesy of www.citizen.co.za. Click here for the original report.","html":"Article courtesy of www.citizen.co.za. Click here for the original report. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
